data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions an automated reminder for bowel prep, there is no concrete evidence of API endpoints or state checks that demonstrate the capability to send reminders for incomplete tasks. This lack of specific evidence leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks for auto-reminders for incomplete items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that reminders are sent for incomplete checklist items.
